MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-30-2021 IN 206 -- APPEARANCES BY LISA BLANCO JIMENEZ, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF ERIC TAYLOR; JENNIFER DONNELLAN, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO -- DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/28/22 IS CONTINUED TO 7/25/22 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. DISCOVERY, MOTION AND ALL OTHER PRETRIAL DEADLINES WILL BE RECALCULATED ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE, AS REFLECTED ON THE ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MS. DONNELLAN TO SERVE SIGNED ORDER. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE OF CONTINUED TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Matter is transferred to department 501 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on the same date. That department handles wrongful eviction actions per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.
